news.title: Oil prices soar 13% as Trump's Iran war speech stokes fears of further escalation
news.summary: Oil surged as Trump in his address to the nation on Iran war said that he expected the conflict to last another two to three weeks. Oil surged asTrump in his speech on Iran War said he expected that the conflict would last another 2 to 3 weeks.

news.title: Tesla reports 358,000 first-quarter vehicle deliveries, down 14% from last quarter
news.summary: Tesla is coming off a year of declining deliveries due in part to increased competition from rivals in China offering lower-cost models. Tesla is based in Palo Alto, California.

news.title: Coca-Cola unveils ad campaign with 13 restaurant chains to boost drink sales as diner traffic falls
news.summary: The restaurant industry has been struggling with declining traffic and sluggish sales growth. The restaurant industry is facing a number of issues, including declining sales growth and declining traffic.

news.title: One year on from Trump's 'liberation day,' global investors are rethinking American exceptionalism
news.summary: U.S. exceptionalism is "no longer automatic" among global investors, one market watcher says. U.N. Secretary-General Ban Ki-moon has called for a U.S.-led global effort to improve the economy. The United States is the largest economy in the world.

news.title: DHS shutdown: Senate advances deal to fund agency with TSA, waits on House
news.summary: The Department of Homeland Security shutdown that sowed chaos in airports across the country could draw to a close. GOP leaders coalesced around a deal.

news.title: Pariah Capital won the first quarter — and it’s winning the war
news.summary: The imaginary fund created by MarketWatch that invests in stocks hated by Wall Street has outperformed the S&P 500, the Nasdaq and most active fund managers.

news.title: Tesla’s stock falls as new numbers show weakness in both the EV and energy businesses
news.summary: Elon Musk's company reported vehicle sales and energy-storage deployments well below Wall Street’s expectations. Musk: “I don’t think we’ve seen anything like this in our history.”

news.title: Investor in pre-IPO Apple: Questionable management, price is rich, but the sector is hot
news.summary: Venture capitalist Don Valentine invested $150,000 in Apple in 1978. Valentine invested two years before the startup went public. Apple went public in 1986.

news.title: Airline stocks drop, but worries over rising fuel prices haven’t hurt travel demand yet
news.summary: Airline stocks are falling amid renewed worries about rising fuel costs, and how that could eventually hurt travel demand. Airline stocks were falling amid renewed worries aboutrising fuel costs.

news.title: The S&P 500 could hit bottom by May — and 6,000 is the stock market’s correction floor
news.summary: Strong one-day rallies are far more common in weak markets. Strong one- day rallies are more common when markets are in a state of weakness.
